hypothesis: Relaxing and scoring generated crystal structures using a state-of-the-art graph neural network interatomic potential to estimate formation energies and perform geometric relaxations will reproduce DFT-based SUN and RMSD rankings of generative models with a Spearman correlation of at least 0.8 on MP- and OQMD-derived benchmarks of ≥1,000 structures, enabling reliable low-cost screening.
